description: Auto-run macro executes when document opens

description: AutoExec macro — runs on Word startup
detail: Persists across all documents opened in Word

detail: Fileless attack vector — no macro needed, uses DDE protocol

description: Downloads file from internet — dropper behaviour

detail: Used to download payloads or exfiltrate data over HTTP

detail: Used to execute malicious DLLs and bypass application controls
